title: Compulsion Games leaves Xbox and seeks new projects as an independent studio
summary: After eight years under Microsoft, the creator of South of Midnight separates and offers co-development services.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen expands its content and shows solid performance on Switch 2
summary: The expansion includes new regions, an infinite fast travel system, and exceeds 30 fps on Nintendo's console.

title: Rumors intensify about a possible OLED version of Switch 2
summary: Nintendo evaluates the option of an OLED screen for its next console, but price remains a concern.

title: Dying Light: The Beast will not come to PS4 or Xbox One due to technical limitations
summary: Techland studio confirms that previous generation consoles lack the necessary power to run the spin-off.

title: Beast of Reincarnation reveals details of its combat and a new trailer
summary: The action RPG from the Pokémon studio showcases its perfect parry system and offers an overview of the game.

title: Kingdom Hearts prepares a special event for its 25th anniversary in August
summary: The saga will have a prominent presence at a Disney event, although it is recommended not to expect Kingdom Hearts 4 announcements.

title: Ubisoft admits its internal crisis and announces a more selective release model
summary: The company acknowledges the consequences of cuts and plans to reduce reliance on big individual releases.

title: Call of Duty Black Ops 1 and 2 re-releases suffer a hacker invasion on PlayStation
summary: Activision acknowledges the problem and promises to implement measures to combat cheaters in these classic titles.

title: Video game industry reaches record number in mergers and acquisitions
summary: With $2.3 billion in the second quarter, business consolidation sparks debates about its impact on the sector.

title: Developers ask not to rush the next generation of consoles
summary: Game directors and industry veterans warn about high prices and argue that a delay could be beneficial.

title: Xbox faces poor prospects and criticism for layoffs in the industry
summary: While a forecast anticipates a complicated future for the brand, players demand an end to the wave of layoffs.

title: Glen Schofield, creator of Dead Space, announces his retirement from the industry
summary: The veteran developer, who worked on Call of Duty and Dead Space, bids farewell after a decades-long career.

title: Steve Buscemi joins the Far Cry series in a mysterious role
summary: The actor will be part of the cast of the television adaptation of the Ubisoft franchise, generating expectations about his character.

title: Steve Allison, head of Epic Games Store, joins Saber Interactive
summary: After eight years at Epic, the executive takes on the role of business director at the game development company.

title: Ubisoft Barcelona lays off workers after launch of Black Flag Resynced
summary: Employees report that the company has abandoned them while celebrating the game's success.

title: Sony is reported for alleged monopoly in Mexico for eliminating physical format
summary: An official complaint accuses Sony of anticompetitive practices by removing discs from its PlayStation consoles.

title: George Lucas defends artificial intelligence and criticizes its detractors
summary: The filmmaker compares rejecting AI to preferring horses over cars and asserts that it is the inevitable future.

title: Palworld guides to optimize base building and resource gathering
summary: Various portals share practical tips to master the world of Palworld.

title: Call of Duty: reaction to Captain Price's cameo and request for Classic mode for MW4
summary: Activision responds to the surprising appearance of Captain Price, while fans ask for a classic mode in Modern Warfare 4.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2's new director guarantees the continuity of the saga
summary: Kunio Suzuki states he is qualified to maintain the legacy of the series after the departure of Hideaki Itsuno.
